debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hnotmax : ¬@Graph.IsMaxMatching α β G M
inst✝ : G.EdgeFinite
M' : Set β
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hM'cd : M.encard < M'.encard
⊢ ∃ P, @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P

failed_attempts:
let H := hM.restrict₂ hM'
  have hH_deg : H.MaxDegreeLE 2 := hM.symmDiff_maxDegree_le_two hM'
  have h_diff : (E(H) ∩ M).encard < (E(H) ∩ M').encard := by
    rw [encard_diff_add_encard_inter M M', encard_diff_add_encard_inter M' M] at hM'cd
    rw [inter_comm] at hM'cd
    refine (WithTop.add_lt_add_iff_right (M.toFinite.inter M').encard_lt_top.ne).mp ?_
    convert hM'cd using 1 <;> { simp [H, IsMatching.restrict₂, symmDiff_def]; ext; simp; tauto }

  let S := H.edgeSet
  have exists_C : ∃ C, C.IsCompOf H ∧ C.IsPathGraph ∧ (E(C) ∩ M).encard < (E(C) ∩ M').encard := by
    induction S using Set.Finite.induction_on_subset generalizing H with
    | empty h0 => rw [h0] at h_diff; simp at h_diff
    | insert e s _ _ ih H' hH'_deg hH'_sub hH'_diff =>
      let C := H'.component (H'.fst e)
      by_cases hc : (E(C) ∩ M).encard < (E(C) ∩ M').encard
      · refine ⟨C, H'.isCompOf_component _, ?_, hc⟩
        have hC_deg := hH'_deg.mono (H'.subgraph_component _).le
        cases hC_deg.connected.isPathGraph_or_isCycleGraph with
        | inl hp => exact hp
        | inr hc_cyc =>
            rw [hM.inter_encard_eq_of_isCycleGraph_isCompOf_symmDiff hM' hc_cyc (H'.isCompOf_component _)] at hc
            exact (lt_irrefl _ hc).elim
      · let H'' := H' \ C
        have h_sub : E(H'') ⊆ s := fun f hf ↦ by
           obtain ⟨hf', hfC⟩ := Graph.diff_edgeSet.mp hf
           have := hH'_sub hf'
           rw [mem_insert_iff] at this
           cases this with
           | inl heq => subst heq; exact (hfC (H'.mem_edgeSet_component_of_mem_edgeSet hf')).elim
           | inr hmem => exact hmem
        have h_diff'' : (E(H'') ∩ M).encard < (E(H'') ∩ M').encard := by
          have hd : Disjoint E(C) E(H'') := disjoint_edge_component_diff C H'
          rw [←encard_union_eq hd, ←encard_union_eq hd] at hH'_diff
          rw [inter_distrib_right, inter_distrib_right, encard_union_eq, encard_union_eq] at hH'_diff
          · exact lt_of_add_lt_add_left (hH'_diff.trans_le (add_le_add_right (not_lt.mp hc) _))
          all_goals exact Disjoint.mono (inter_subset_left _ _) (inter_subset_left _ _) hd
        obtain ⟨C', hC', hpath, hcard⟩ := ih H'' (hH'_deg.mono (diff_le _ _)) h_sub h_diff''
        exact ⟨C', hC'.trans_le (diff_le _ _), hpath, hcard⟩

  obtain ⟨C, hC_comp, hC_path, hC_card⟩ := exists_C
  obtain ⟨P, hP_path, hP_eq⟩ := hC_path.exists_path_eq_edgeSet

  have hP_alt : G.IsAltPath hM P := by
    constructor
    · exact hP_path.of_subgraph (hC_comp.le.trans (Graph.restrict_le_self _))
    · rw [hP_path.isChain_iff_of_isPathGraph hC_path hP_eq, hP_eq]
      intro e he f hf
      have he' : e ∈ M ∆ M' := hC_comp.le he
      have hf' : f ∈ M ∆ M' := hC_comp.le hf
      simp only [symmDiff_def, mem_union, mem_diff] at he' hf'
      cases he' <;> cases hf'
      all_goals simp_all [or_comm]

  have h_ends : P.first ∉ V(G, M) ∧ P.last ∉ V(G, M) := by
    have h_count : (P.edge.toSet ∩ M).encard < (P.edge.toSet ∩ M').encard := by rwa [hP_eq]
    have h_odd : Odd P.edge.length := by
      rw [WList.length_eq_encard_edge, ←union_inter_diff_eq_self P.edge.toSet M, encard_union_eq,
        ←union_inter_diff_eq_self P.edge.toSet M', encard_union_eq]
      · simp only [hP_eq]
        have h_disj : Disjoint (E(C) ∩ M) (E(C) ∩ M') := 
           disjoint_of_subset_right (inter_subset_right _ _) (disjoint_of_subset_left (inter_subset_right _ _) (disjoint_diff_inter _ _))
        rw [encard_diff_add_encard_inter M M', encard_diff_add_encard_inter M' M] at hC_card
        -- Counts differ by 1 implies sum is odd. 
        -- Standard parity argument for alternating path.
        sorry -- Parity algebra
      all_goals sorry
    -- If count M < count M', P starts and ends with M'.
    -- Endpoints degree 1 in C, so degree 1 in H.
    -- Incident to M', so not M.
    sorry

  exact ⟨P, hP_alt, P.nonempty_of_length_pos (by sorry), h_ends.1, h_ends.2⟩
